description: Repair the pagination logic of the thesis draft at '/home/ga/Documents/thesis_draft.docx' to ensure a robust layout. Remove all manual page breaks and update the document styles: configure 'Heading 1' to automatically include a page break before, set 'Heading 2' to keep with the next paragraph, and enable widow and orphan control for 'Body Text'. Save the repaired document to '/home/ga/Documents/thesis_repaired.docx' without modifying the text content.
